content: SubmitHub: 6,000+ active curators, credit-based system, curators have visible genre preferences/approval rates/feedback habits. 4.5M+ submissions processed in 2025. Premium submission acceptance rate 20-25%. Groover: 3,500+ curators, pay-per-submission €2, guaranteed response in 7 days or refund, includes record labels/sync agencies/radio alongside playlist curators. Strong in European markets. Both show curator data (response rate, genre focus) before sending. PlaylistPush: ~32% playlist add rate, higher cost. Key product insight: curator profile cards with genre tags, response rate, recent playlist examples are table stakes. Artists need to compare fit before spending credits/money.
